sections.paragraph: διαφϑείρω [διά, φθείρω, s. next] ‘cause destruction’, ruin Lk 12:33; wear out 2 Cor 4:16; wreck, of ships Rv 8:9.—In extended sense, of moral ruination corrupt 1 Ti 6:5.—In wordplay δ. τοὺς διαφϑείροντας τὴν γῆν ruin (destroy) those who ruin (deprave) the earth (i.e. its inhabitants) Rv 11:18.
